description: HuggingFace Phase 6: h2_end_stream=2 (delayed END_STREAM). DB change: h2_end_stream 1->2. Body already arrives (#495 BODY_PRESENT), testing if delayed END_STREAM lets ReadableStream async iterator yield chunk before stream closes.
steps: 3. DevTools F12 -> Network (Preserve log ON) + Console
6. 스크린샷: 전체 UI + Network Response body + Console
notes: h2_end_stream=2 최초 시도. deepseek 성공 패턴 적용. #495에서 body 도착 확인됨 — 파서 처리 여부가 관건.
